docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DILLOF, NINA AS TO DEFENDANT SANTILLANA, LUIS MANUEL DOES 1-20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-02-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-30-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-18-2003
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR NOV-18-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
RESPONSE TO OSC RE: POS; DECLARATION OF ATTORNEY FILED BY PLAINTIFF DILLOF, NINA
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-18-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. (212) PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: GENA EALES, CSR	176. (212)
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SANTILLANA, LUIS MANUEL
DEMAND FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT SANTILLANA, LUIS MANUEL

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR MAR-01-2004. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-12-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. JAN-02-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SANTILLANA, LUIS MANUEL JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 6.0 DAYS
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DILLOF, NINA JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 DAYS
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE MAR-11-2004.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR MARGARET MARY FARLEY.
ARBITRATOR SCOTT HOWARD WECHSLER APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION MAR-12-2004 THROUGH JUN-10-2004.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-12-2004 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-12-2004 CONTINUED TO AUG-19-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON JUL-12-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. (DISMISSAL PENDING)
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-19-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
